title: DWP annual report and accounts 2024 to 2025
body: "This Department for Work and Pensions (DWP) report includes:   the department’s goals and associated outcomes in the financial year ending March 2025 the financial position and results for the financial year ending March 2025   We have also published spreadsheets of the core tables from the report showing the department’s:   total spending from the financial year ending March 2021 to its plans for the financial year ending March 2026 administration budget from the financial year ending March 2021 to its plans for the financial year ending March 2026   "
